fields.name: Change_Type
fields.description: An indicator showing if the payment record is New, Added, Changed, or Unchanged in the current publication compared to the previous publication. NEW - To identify “new” records added from the end of the previous submission deadline until the current submission period deadline date ADDED - To identify records that were not eligible at the time of previous publication, which is eligible for current publication. CHANGED - To identify previously published records modified after the last publication. UNCHANGED - To identify previously published records that remain “unchanged” in current publication.
fields.title: change_type

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_Type
fields.description: An indicator showing if the recipient of the payment or transfer of value is a physician-covered recipient or non- physician practitioner or a teaching hospital.
fields.title: covered_recipient_type

fields.name: Teaching_Hospital_CCN
fields.description: A unique identifying number (CMS Certification Number) of the Teaching Hospital receiving the payment or other transfer of value.
fields.title: teaching_hospital_ccn

fields.name: Teaching_Hospital_ID
fields.description: The system generated a unique identifier of the Teaching Hospital receiving the payment or other transfer of value.
fields.title: teaching_hospital_id

fields.name: Teaching_Hospital_Name
fields.description: The name of the Teaching Hospital receiving the payment or other transfer of value. The name displayed is as listed in CMS teaching hospital list under Hospital name.
fields.title: teaching_hospital_name

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_Profile_ID
fields.description: System generated unique identifier for covered recipient physician or covered recipient non-physician practitioner profile receiving the payment or other transfer of value.
fields.title: covered_recipient_profile_id

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_NPI
fields.description: National Provider Identifier is a unique identification number for covered recipient physician or covered recipient non-physician practitioner (and not the NPI of a group the physician/non-physician practitioner belongs to).
fields.title: covered_recipient_npi

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_First_Name
fields.description: First name of the covered recipient physician or covered recipient non-physician practitioner receiving the payment or transfer of value, as reported by the submitting entity.
fields.title: covered_recipient_first_name

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_Middle_Name
fields.description: Middle name of the covered recipient physician or covered recipient non-physician practitioner receiving the payment or transfer of value, as reported by the submitting entity.
fields.title: covered_recipient_middle_name

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_Last_Name
fields.description: Last name of the covered recipient physician or covered recipient non-physician practitioner receiving the payment or transfer of value, as reported by the submitting entity.
fields.title: covered_recipient_last_name

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_Name_Suffix
fields.description: Name suffix of the covered recipient physician or covered recipient non-physician practitioner receiving the payment or transfer of value, as reported by the submitting entity.
fields.title: covered_recipient_name_suffix

fields.name: Recipient_Primary_Business_Street_Address_Line1
fields.description: The first line of the primary practice/business street address of the physician or teaching hospital (covered recipient) receiving the payment or other transfer of value.
fields.title: recipient_primary_business_street_address_line1

fields.name: Recipient_Primary_Business_Street_Address_Line2
fields.description: The second line of the primary practice/business street address of the physician or teaching hospital (covered recipient) receiving the payment or other transfer of value.
fields.title: recipient_primary_business_street_address_line2

fields.name: Recipient_City
fields.description: The primary practice/business city of the physician or teaching hospital (covered recipient) receiving the payment or other transfer of value.
fields.title: recipient_city

fields.name: Recipient_State
fields.description: The primary practice/business state or territory abbreviation of the physician or teaching hospital (covered recipient) receiving the payment or transfer of value, if the primary practice/business address is in United States.
fields.title: recipient_state

fields.name: Recipient_Zip_Code
fields.description: The 9-digit zip code for the primary practice/business location of the physician or teaching hospital (covered recipient) receiving the payment or transfer of value.
fields.example: US Zip9 code format: 21244-3712 US Zip5 code format: 21244
fields.title: recipient_zip_code

fields.name: Recipient_Country
fields.description: The primary practice/business address country name of the physician or teaching hospital (covered recipient) receiving the payment or transfer of value.
fields.title: recipient_country

fields.name: Recipient_Province
fields.description: The primary practice/business province name of the physician (covered recipient) receiving the payment or other transfer of value, if the primary practice/business address is outside the United States, and if applicable.
fields.title: recipient_province

fields.name: Recipient_Postal_Code
fields.description: The international postal code for the primary practice/business location of the physician (covered recipient) receiving the payment or other transfer of value, if the primary practice/business address is outside the United States
fields.title: recipient_postal_code

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_Primary_Type_1
fields.description: Primary type of medicine practiced by the physician or Non- Physician Practitioner (covered recipient).
fields.title: covered_recipient_primary_type_1

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_Primary_Type_2
fields.description: Primary type of medicine practiced by the physician or Non- Physician Practitioner (covered recipient). Note: OP began accepting this field in PY2021.
fields.title: covered_recipient_primary_type_2

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_Primary_Type_3
fields.description: Primary type of medicine practiced by the physician or Non- Physician Practitioner (covered recipient). Note: OP began accepting this field in PY2021.
fields.title: covered_recipient_primary_type_3

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_Primary_Type_4
fields.description: Primary type of medicine practiced by the physician or Non- Physician Practitioner (covered recipient). Note: OP began accepting this field in PY2021.
fields.title: covered_recipient_primary_type_4

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_Primary_Type_5
fields.description: Primary type of medicine practiced by the physician or Non- Physician Practitioner (covered recipient). Note: OP began accepting this field in PY2021.
fields.title: covered_recipient_primary_type_5

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_Primary_Type_6
fields.description: Primary type of medicine practiced by the physician or Non- Physician Practitioner (covered recipient). Note: OP began accepting this field in PY2021.
fields.title: covered_recipient_primary_type_6

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_Specialty_1
fields.description: Physician's or non-physician practitioner’s specialty chosen from the standardized "provider taxonomy" code list. Note: OP began accepting this field in PY2021.
fields.title: covered_recipient_specialty_1

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_Specialty_2
fields.description: Physician's or non-physician practitioner’s specialty chosen from the standardized "provider taxonomy" code list. Note: OP began accepting this field in PY2021.
fields.title: covered_recipient_specialty_2

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_Specialty_3
fields.description: Physician's or non-physician practitioner’s specialty chosen from the standardized "provider taxonomy" code list. Note: OP began accepting this field in PY2021.
fields.title: covered_recipient_specialty_3

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_Specialty_4
fields.description: Physician's or non-physician practitioner’s specialty chosen from the standardized "provider taxonomy" code list. Note: OP began accepting this field in PY2021.
fields.title: covered_recipient_specialty_4

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_Specialty_5
fields.description: Physician's or non-physician practitioner’s specialty chosen from the standardized "provider taxonomy" code list. Note: OP began accepting this field in PY2021.
fields.title: covered_recipient_specialty_5

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_Specialty_6
fields.description: Physician's or non-physician practitioner’s specialty chosen from the standardized "provider taxonomy" code list. Note: OP began accepting this field in PY2021.
fields.title: covered_recipient_specialty_6

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_License_State_code1
fields.description: The state license number of the covered recipient physician or covered recipient non-physician practitioner, which is a 2-letter state abbreviation; the record may include up to 5 license states, if a physician is licensed in multiple states.
fields.title: covered_recipient_license_state_code1

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_License_State_code2
fields.description: The state license number of the covered recipient physician or covered recipient non-physician practitioner, which is a 2-letter state abbreviation; the record may include up to 5 license states, if a physician is licensed in multiple states.
fields.title: covered_recipient_license_state_code2

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_License_State_code3
fields.description: The state license number of the covered recipient physician or covered recipient non-physician practitioner, which is a 2-letter state abbreviation; the record may include up to 5 license states, if a physician is licensed in multiple states.
fields.title: covered_recipient_license_state_code3

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_License_State_code4
fields.description: The state license number of the covered recipient physician or covered recipient non-physician practitioner, which is a 2-letter state abbreviation; the record may include up to 5 license states, if a physician is licensed in multiple states.
fields.title: covered_recipient_license_state_code4

fields.name: Covered_Recipient_License_State_code5
fields.description: The state license number of the covered recipient physician or covered recipient non-physician practitioner, which is a 2-letter state abbreviation; the record may include up to 5 license states, if a physician is licensed in multiple states.
fields.title: covered_recipient_license_state_code5

fields.name: Submitting_Applicable_Manufacturer_or_Applicable_GPO_Name
fields.description: The textual proper name of the submitting applicable manufacturer or submitting applicable GPO.
fields.title: submitting_applicable_manufacturer_or_applicable_gpo_name

fields.name: Applicable_Manufacturer_or_Applicable_GPO_Making_Payment_ID
fields.description: System generated unique identifier of the Applicable Manufacturer or Applicable Group Purchasing Organization (GPO) Making a payment or other transfer of value
fields.title: applicable_manufacturer_or_applicable_gpo_making_payment_id

fields.name: Applicable_Manufacturer_or_Applicable_GPO_Making_Payment_Name
fields.description: The textual proper name of the applicable manufacturer or applicable GPO making the payment or other transfer of value
fields.title: applicable_manufacturer_or_applicable_gpo_making_payment_name

fields.name: Applicable_Manufacturer_or_Applicable_GPO_Making_Payment_State
fields.description: State name of the submitting applicable manufacturer or submitting applicable GPO as provided in Open Payments
fields.title: applicable_manufacturer_or_applicable_gpo_making_payment_state

fields.name: Applicable_Manufacturer_or_Applicable_GPO_Making_Payment_Country
fields.description: Country name of the Submitting Applicable Manufacturer or Submitting Applicable Group Purchasing Organization (GPO) as provided in Open Payments
fields.title: applicable_manufacturer_or_applicable_gpo_making_payment_country

fields.name: Total_Amount_of_Payment_USDollars
fields.description: U.S. dollar amount of payment or other transfer of value to the recipient (manufacturer must convert to dollar currency if necessary)
fields.title: total_amount_of_payment_usdollars

fields.name: Date_of_Payment
fields.description: If a singular payment, then this is the actual date the payment was issued; if a series of payments or an aggregated set of payments, this is the date of the first payment to the covered recipient in this PY
fields.title: date_of_payment

fields.name: Number_of_Payments_Included_in_Total_Amount
fields.description: The number of discrete payments being reported in the "Total Amount of Payment".
fields.title: number_of_payments_included_in_total_amount

fields.name: Form_of_Payment_or_Transfer_of_Value
fields.description: The method of payment used to pay the covered recipient or to make the transfer of value.
fields.title: form_of_payment_or_transfer_of_value

fields.name: Nature_of_Payment_or_Transfer_of_Value
fields.description: The nature of payment used to pay the covered recipient or to make the transfer of value.
fields.title: nature_of_payment_or_transfer_of_value

fields.name: City_of_Travel
fields.description: For "Travel and Lodging" payments, destination city where covered recipient traveled.
fields.title: city_of_travel

fields.name: State_of_Travel
fields.description: For "Travel and Lodging" payments, the destination state where the covered recipient traveled.
fields.title: state_of_travel

fields.name: Country_of_Travel
fields.description: For "Travel and Lodging" payments, the destination country where the covered recipient traveled.
fields.title: country_of_travel

fields.name: Physician_Ownership_Indicator
fields.description: Indicates whether the physician holds an ownership or investment interest in the applicable manufacturer; this indicator is limited to physician's ownership, not the physician's family members' ownership
fields.title: physician_ownership_indicator

fields.name: Third_Party_Payment_Recipient_Indicator
fields.description: Indicates if a payment or transfer of value was paid to a third party entity or individual at the request of or on behalf of a covered recipient (physician or teaching hospital).
fields.title: third_party_payment_recipient_indicator

fields.name: Name_of_Third_Party_Entity_Receiving_Payment_or_Transfer_of_Value
fields.description: The name of the entity that received the payment or other transfer of value.
fields.title: name_of_third_party_entity_receiving_payment_or_transfer_of_ccfc

fields.name: Charity_Indicator
fields.description: Indicates the third party entity that received the payment or other transfer of value is a charity.
fields.title: charity_indicator

fields.name: Third_Party_Equals_Covered_Recipient_Indicator
fields.description: An indicator showing the "Third Party" that received the payment or other transfer of value is a Covered Recipient.
fields.title: third_party_equals_covered_recipient_indicator

fields.name: Contextual_Information
fields.description: Any free String, which the reporting entity deems helpful or appropriate regarding this payment or other transfer of value.
fields.example: Transfer made to promote the use of the product
fields.title: contextual_information

fields.name: Delay_in_Publication_Indicator
fields.description: An indicator showing if an Applicable Manufacturer/GPO is requesting a delay in the publication of a payment or other transfer of value
fields.title: delay_in_publication_indicator

fields.name: Record_ID
fields.description: System-assigned identifier to the general transaction at the time of submission
fields.title: record_id

fields.name: Dispute_Status_for_Publication
fields.description: Indicates whether the payment or other transfer of value is disputed by the covered recipient or not
fields.title: dispute_status_for_publication

fields.name: Related_Product_Indicator
fields.description: The indicator allows the applicable manufacturer or applicable GPO to select whether the payment or other transfer of value is related to one or more product(s) (drugs, devices, biologicals, or medical supplies). If the payment was not made in relation to a product, select "No". If the payment was related to one or more products, select "Yes".
fields.title: related_product_indicator

fields.name: Covered_or_Noncovered_Indicator_1
fields.description: Each product listed in relation to the payment or other transfer of value, indicates if the product is a covered or non-covered product per the covered product definition in the Open Payments final rule.
fields.title: covered_or_noncovered_indicator_1

fields.name: Indicate_Drug_or_Biological_or_Device_or_Medical_Supply_1
fields.description: Each product listed in relation to the payment or other transfer of value, indicates if the product is a drug, device, biological, or medical supply.
fields.title: indicate_drug_or_biological_or_device_or_medical_supply_1

fields.name: Product_Category_or_Therapeutic_Area_1
fields.description: Provide the product category or therapeutic area for the covered drug, device, biological, or medical supply listed in relation to the payment or other transfer of value.
fields.title: product_category_or_therapeutic_area_1

fields.name: Name_of_Drug_or_Biological_or_Device_or_Medical_Supply_1
fields.description: The marketed name of the drug, device, biological, or medical supply. May report the marketed name of up to five products (drugs, devices, biologicals, or medical supplies) associated with the payment or other transfer of value.
fields.title: name_of_drug_or_biological_or_device_or_medical_supply_1

fields.name: Associated_Drug_or_Biological_NDC_1
fields.description: The National Drug Code, if any, of the drug or biological associated with the payment or other transfer of value (if applicable); the record may report up to 5 codes
fields.title: associated_drug_or_biological_ndc_1

fields.name: Associated_Device_or_Medical_Supply_PDI_1
fields.description: The Primary Device Identifier, if any, of the covered device or covered medical supply associated with the payment or other transfer of values (if applicable); the record may report up to 5 codes. Note: OP Program began collecting PDI information during PY 2021.
fields.title: associated_device_or_medical_supply_pdi_1

fields.name: Covered_or_Noncovered_Indicator_2
fields.description: For each product listed in relation to the payment or other transfer of value, indicates if the product is a covered or non-covered product per the covered product definition in the Open Payments final rule.
fields.title: covered_or_noncovered_indicator_2

fields.name: Indicate_Drug_or_Biological_or_Device_or_Medical_Supply_2
fields.description: For each product listed in relation to the payment or other transfer of value, indicates if the product is a drug, device, biological, or medical supply.
fields.title: indicate_drug_or_biological_or_device_or_medical_supply_2

fields.name: Product_Category_or_Therapeutic_Area_2
fields.description: Provide the product category or therapeutic area for the covered drug, device, biological, or medical supply listed in relation to the payment or other transfer of value.
fields.title: product_category_or_therapeutic_area_2

fields.name: Name_of_Drug_or_Biological_or_Device_or_Medical_Supply_2
fields.description: The marketed name of the drug, device, biological, or medical supply. May report the marketed name of up to five products (drugs, devices, biologicals, or medical supplies) associated with the payment or other transfer of value.
fields.title: name_of_drug_or_biological_or_device_or_medical_supply_2

fields.name: Associated_Drug_or_Biological_NDC_2
fields.description: The National Drug Code, if any, of the drug or biological associated with the payment or other transfer of value (if applicable); the record may report up to 5 codes
fields.title: associated_drug_or_biological_ndc_2

fields.name: Associated_Device_or_Medical_Supply_PDI_2

fields.title: associated_device_or_medical_supply_pdi_2

fields.name: Program_Year
fields.description: The year in which the payment occurred, as reported by submitting entity.
fields.title: program_year

fields.name: Payment_Publication_Date

fields.title: payment_publication_date
